item.title: The world has gotten so crazy.

item.title: Narratives
item.description: "Narratives" - by Len Pennie. (Had to clip and slightly speed up to fit into 1min.) Opening message on screen: "This piece was written using the messages bravely given by survivors of abuse [blue heart emoji]" Ending message on screen: "Dedicated to those who survive, and those we have lost [blue heart emoji]" Original: https://www.instagram.com/reel/C9lU_W_quf2/?igsh=aGRmOGdueHU5MTRi
item.dc:creator: RunawaySpoons

item.title: Bob Newhart never dies...

item.dc:creator: richiWebKing

item.title: He did things in his own way!
item.dc:creator: TheRainbowegoSweet007

item.title: I need to brag about this
item.description: I've been overweight for more than 18 years and I lost about 40kg the past 3 years. It's not enough to be at a "normal" range (still overweight) but enough to start trying to run safely and it's a real victory for someone who, if you'd asked me 3 years ago that I started to like running, would've laughed you in the face for it. I don't care if this dies in the usersub, I'm feeling good right now. ヾ(⌐■_■)ノ♪ (๑•̀ㅂ•́)و✧ (~‾▿‾)~ Edit: In freedom units: 9km per hour = 5,6 miles per hour, 40kg = 88 pounds
item.dc:creator: Sidaige

item.title: Images of Note: Using a Lader.
item.description:
1000 bits on tonight's stream and I do this to my CV. http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
mood
Pinkie is a good shot
:c
Hell yeah
Oh McGruff and the Dare Lion for sure.
This has basically been me all day
IT'S WIZARD TIME!
oh to be dressed as a clown committing crimes
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream (m/w/f around 1830 UK time) http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging

item.title: Would you like to see some adorable otters?
item.description:
That was a rhetorical question. Because of course you want to see some adorable otters.
BABY OTTER SWIM TIME ENRICHMENT
Want to play, but so sleepy....
Toy distraction: 60% of the time, it works every time.
This little baby was just rescued very recently:
These are from the VA Marine Mammal Rescue Society on IG: https://www.instagram.com/vammrs If you have the means, I encourage you to support them in any way you can! ❤️
item.dc:creator: MizWeirdo

item.title: They would be a lot less angry if they’d just be their authentic selves.
item.description: It’s working fine in my area, I just wish they’d stop trying to force us to use the paid version.
